Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff Suu Hang Gordon Wong'S Reqyests For Production Of Documents, Set One; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-14-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT FLORIDA INTERNATIONAL JET SCHOOL INC. Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff Siu Hang Gordon Wong'S Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; And Request For Sanctions. The Motion is denied as the responses to the RFPD's indicate that Plaintiff does not have any responsive documents. However, Plaintiff is directed to provide a log by December 2, 2014 of any documents withheld on privilege. All requests for sanctions are denied. Prevailing party to prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; Points And Autorities In Support Thereof; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT FLORIDA INTERNATIONAL JET SCHOOL INC. Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; And Request For Sanctions. The Motion to compel further responses to Interrogatory Nos. 7, 10, 16, 19, 23, 26, 27, 30, 32, 33, 34, 36, 37, 40, 41, and 52 is granted. Plaintiff shall provide supplemental responses by December 2, 2014. The motion as to all other interrogatories is denied. Sanctions denied. Prevailing party to prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
